reviews.review_description: You did put some effort into the monsters, but apparently it looks like you didn’t bake the lighting so just makes it look really bad and also there is no moderation because it’s just dead. The games dead hasn’t been updated in a month or two months I meant and it’s just like the next next level just like when you tap the door it just loads in a forest and then there’s a chance that will load back in level one which means you’ll fall into the void. 2.5

reviews.review_title: You should install it pretty good game
